root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. It's pretty fun to watch you blow up like a balloon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a pity! Burnett should've been here to see you like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a pity! Burnett should've been here to see you like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a pity! Burnett should've been here to see you like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah! You call that shooting?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah! You call that shooting?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah! You call that shooting?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. So without Burnett, you're just a bunch of kids who shoot guns while wearing suits, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. So without Burnett, you're just a bunch of kids who shoot guns while wearing suits, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. So without Burnett, you're just a bunch of kids who shoot guns while wearing suits, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah...!! Aaargh...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah...!! Aaargh...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah...!! Aaargh...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's no use resisting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's no use resisting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's no use resisting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Any human who is not qualified to become a vessel will become a Remains by even the smallest quantity of the Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Any human who is not qualified to become a vessel will become a Remains by even the smallest quantity of the Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Any human who is not qualified to become a vessel will become a Remains by even the smallest quantity of the Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh... Aaagh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh... Aaagh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh... Aaagh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, let's see how long you can last, you old hound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, let's see how long you can last, you old hound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, let's see how long you can last, you old hound.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You made it all the way here, but you chose to just lie there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You made it all the way here, but you chose to just lie there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You made it all the way here, but you chose to just lie there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, you're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, you're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, you're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's such a hassle to explain every time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's such a hassle to explain every time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's such a hassle to explain every time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't go into any detail... so let's just say I'm the MacCready you know of.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't go into any detail... so let's just say I'm the MacCready you know of.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't go into any detail... so let's just say I'm the MacCready you know of.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I used some of my Fragment to give you first aid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I used some of my Fragment to give you first aid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I used some of my Fragment to give you first aid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although your lost arm will now become a tentacle like a Remains, it's still better to be able to move around, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although your lost arm will now become a tentacle like a Remains, it's still better to be able to move around, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although your lost arm will now become a tentacle like a Remains, it's still better to be able to move around, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The prophecy was true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The prophecy was true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The prophecy was true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will I be the one to reach the Holy Grail in the end...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will I be the one to reach the Holy Grail in the end...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will I be the one to reach the Holy Grail in the end...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prophecy? What are you talking about? Have you gone insane?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prophecy? What are you talking about? Have you gone insane?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prophecy? What are you talking about? Have you gone insane?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, could you gather all the Society Members under your command?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, could you gather all the Society Members under your command?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, could you gather all the Society Members under your command?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution bastards are going to come any second now, and I can't have them disturb this moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution bastards are going to come any second now, and I can't have them disturb this moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution bastards are going to come any second now, and I can't have them disturb this moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After ending the daring hounds over there, we head back to the Normalside with the Holy Grail to prepare for the ritual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After ending the daring hounds over there, we head back to the Normalside with the Holy Grail to prepare for the ritual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After ending the daring hounds over there, we head back to the Normalside with the Holy Grail to prepare for the ritual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Society has been around for eons. Always changing names and concealing their identity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Society has been around for eons. Always changing names and concealing their identity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Society has been around for eons. Always changing names and concealing their identity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have obtained the spark of revolution, which provides sufficient justification for a new Society.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have obtained the spark of revolution, which provides sufficient justification for a new Society.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have obtained the spark of revolution, which provides sufficient justification for a new Society.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll purge every ingrate once I get back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll purge every ingrate once I get back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll purge every ingrate once I get back.
